name: Burstbucker 1
description: PAF-style humbucker with asymmetric wind and Alnico 2 magnets; slightly underwound neck pickup used on Les Paul Standard 50s

name: Burstbucker 2
description: PAF-style humbucker with asymmetric wind and Alnico 2 magnets; slightly overwound bridge pickup used on Les Paul Standard 50s

name: Burstbucker 61R
description: 60s-voiced humbucker with Alnico 5 magnets; neck pickup used on Les Paul Standard 60s and SG Standard 61

name: Burstbucker 61T
description: 60s-voiced humbucker with Alnico 5 magnets; bridge pickup used on Les Paul Standard 60s and SG Standard 61

name: 490R
description: Modern-classic Alnico 2 humbucker; neck pickup used on SG Standard and Les Paul Tribute

name: 490T
description: Modern-classic Alnico 2 humbucker calibrated for bridge position; used on SG Standard

name: 498T
description: Higher-output Alnico 5 bridge humbucker; pairs with 490R on Les Paul Custom and Explorer

name: 57 Classic
description: Reproduction of the original PAF with Alnico 2 magnets; used on ES-335 and ES-339 Original Collection

name: 57 Classic Plus
description: Slightly overwound version of the 57 Classic; bridge pickup companion to 57 Classic

name: Burstbucker Pro
description: Higher-output PAF-voiced humbucker with Alnico 5 magnets; used on Les Paul Modern and SG Modern neck position

name: Burstbucker Pro+
description: Hotter Alnico 5 bridge humbucker; used on Les Paul Modern and SG Modern bridge position

name: P-90
description: Gibson soapbar P-90 single-coil; used on Les Paul Special and SG Special

name: P-90 Dog Ear
description: Dog-ear-mounted P-90 single-coil; used on Les Paul Junior and SG Junior

name: Firebird Mini Humbucker Rhythm
description: Bright-voiced mini humbucker; neck pickup in Firebird reverse-body guitars

name: Firebird Mini Humbucker Lead
description: Bright-voiced mini humbucker; bridge pickup in Firebird reverse-body guitars

name: Calibrated T-Type Rhythm
description: Modern T-Type humbucker calibrated for neck position; used on ES-345 and ES-335 Original Collection

name: Calibrated T-Type Lead
description: Modern T-Type humbucker calibrated for bridge position; used on ES-345 and ES-335 Original Collection

name: ProBucker-1
description: Epiphone ProBucker PAF-style neck humbucker with Alnico 2 magnets; used on Epiphone Les Paul Standard 50s

name: ProBucker-2
description: Epiphone ProBucker PAF-style neck humbucker with Alnico 2 magnets; used on Epiphone SG Standard neck position

name: ProBucker-3
description: Slightly hotter Epiphone ProBucker bridge humbucker; used on Epiphone SG Standard bridge

name: P-90 PRO Dog Ear Neck
description: Epiphone P-90 PRO dog-ear neck pickup used on Casino

name: P-90 PRO Dog Ear Bridge
description: Epiphone P-90 PRO dog-ear bridge pickup used on Casino
